writing_rules: Never use 'synergy', 'leverage', 'circle back', or 'move the needle'
Keep sentences under 20 words when possible
Use numbers and metrics over vague claims
Write in first person, active voice
Avoid exclamation marks except in CTAs
Do not start sentences with 'I am writing to...' or 'I hope this finds you well'
Match formality to context: casual for LinkedIn, professional for email, formal for cover letters
When referencing PM work, say 'PM' not 'startup PM' for large companies
Keep LinkedIn connection requests under 300 characters
Every email needs exactly 5 subject line variants
Cover letters must be one page maximum
